name: proxyparser
description: Bun monorepo for proxy subscription parsing, rule patching, and a small operations dashboard.
author: Paperside

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "bun run --cwd backend dev" "bun run --cwd frontend dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "bun run --cwd backend start" "bun run --cwd frontend start"
scripts.build: bun run --cwd backend typecheck && bun run --cwd frontend build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd backend typecheck && bun run --cwd frontend typecheck
